title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Tutorial screen)
scenario: Onboarding tutorial does not display smart charge case screens for Voyager Free 60+ when starting from Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ (Tern) headset is connected to the device via Bluetooth.
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Tutorial option to open the Tutorial screen.
4. On the Tutorial screen, tap Start Onboarding to begin the onboarding process.
5. Observe the onboarding screens that appear during the process.
expected: The onboarding process should display tutorial/onboarding screens for the smart charging case (e.g., charging case features, usage instructions).
